title: Cornelis H. A. Koster
body: Cornelis Hermanus Antonius "Kees" Koster (13 July 1943 – 21 March 2013) was a Dutch computer scientist who was a professor in the Department of Informatics at the Radboud University Nijmegen in the Netherlands.
categories: Academic staff of Radboud University Nijmegen
Academic staff of Technische Universität Berlin
